---
title: "Untitled"
format: 
  html:
    embed-resources: true
---

# Introduction
## About the data
text text text

# Setup
## Read in data

```{r load packages}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
library(readr)
library(here)
```

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false

# here package helps with reading in relative paths

bg_chem <- read_csv(here('data', 'BGchem2008data.csv'))
```

# Analysis
```{r exploring data structure}
#| eval: false
#| echo: false
colnames(bg_chem)
str(bg_chem)
head(bg_chem)
summary(bg_chem)
```

## Summary statistics

```{r}
nitrate <- mean(bg_chem$NO3)
nitrite <- mean(bg_chem$NO2)
amm     <- mean(bg_chem$NH4)
phos    <- mean(bg_chem$P)
```

## Redfield ratio

```{r}
ratio <- (nitrate + nitrite + amm) / phos
ratio
```

The Redfield ratio is approximately `{r} round(ratio)`.

## Plot
```{r}
plot(bg_chem$P, bg_chem$NO2 + bg_chem$NO3 + bg_chem$NH4)
```

# Conclusion
My very good conclusion
